title: Design System Sync — Schema Index
description: Index of all schemas under .claude/skills/design-system-sync/schema/. The 3 contract schemas here are producer-side (LLM fills, validator gates). The 3 shared _shared/*.schema.json modules are referenced via $ref.

shared_schemas.name: RefEnvelope
shared_schemas.description: Meta + data envelope. Composed by all 3 contract schemas below.

shared_schemas.name: Meta
shared_schemas.description: Provenance + identity block at the top of every contract.

shared_schemas.name: VariableEntry
shared_schemas.description: One design-token variable. Used by figma-contract and webflow-contract via $ref. Carries figmaId + modes + aliasOf.

shared_schemas.name: StyleEntry
shared_schemas.description: One text style. Used by figma-contract and webflow-contract via $ref.

contract_schemas.name: ClientFirstBaselineContract
contract_schemas.description: Parsed Client-First V2.2 baseline. Generated by Task 0 (extract_client_first_baseline.py). Prerequisite for the other 2 contracts.

contract_schemas.name: FigmaDesignSystemContract
contract_schemas.description: Figma extraction. Composes ref-envelope + VariableEntry + StyleEntry. LLM-produced in Task 1 via figma-dev-mode-mcp get_variable_defs. BLOCK tier — must validate before Task 3.

contract_schemas.name: WebflowDesignSystemContract
contract_schemas.description: Webflow mapping. Composes ref-envelope + VariableEntry + StyleEntry. LLM-produced in Task 3 via map_variables.py. BLOCK tier — must validate before Webflow write.
